title: Participation in Jobs Fair; Conduct of Jobs Fair. An LMA may participate
content: 37 and conduct recruitment activities based on DMW-approved crew orders, provided that a 38 JFA is secured from the DMW. The requirements and procedures for issuance of a JFA 39 shall be prescribed by the Department. 40 41 The DMW may organize a Jobs Fair in coordination with the concerned Local 42 Government Unit (LGU) and/or with the PESO. 43 44
